title: HOOPER DETOXIFICATION AND STABILIZATION CENTER - 211info
text: HOOPER DETOXIFICATION STABILIZATION CENTER HOOPER DETOXIFICATION AND STABILIZATION CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides medical detoxification and stabilization from chemical dependency by providing outreach, sobering, and sub-acute medical detoxification. During the 6-10 day stay, clients receive medical treatment for early withdrawal symptoms, counseling, and referrals to other programs. 1535 N Williams Avenue Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Age 18 and older with no major medical problems that need to be addressed in a hospital setting Hours: Inpatient admission: Monday-Friday 6:45am-7:45am Outpatient: Monday-Friday 1pm-4pm Business: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 238-2067 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 238-2067 Hooper Center FAX (503) 238-2004 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or email for intake process FEES: Insurance is required, but assistance is available to sign up for OHP. Sliding scale available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: MAX Blue, Red, and Yellow lines. TriMet bus lines 17, 4, 44, 6, 77 Services: Detoxification Medication Assisted Maintenance Treatment for Substance Use Disorders Substance Use Disorder Counseling Substance Use Disorder Crisis Intervention If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOOPER DETOXIFICATION STABILIZATION CENTER
